title: Leather Tweaks
description: Adds new sources of leather and brings bundles back
body:
# About the pack

Ever wanted the bundle retain it's original recipe but also that hide was easier to get  ? this datapack was made specifically for that!
Adds a few features and recipes revolving around leather 

## Pack features:
- Adds back the bundle (with it's original recipe)
- Changes the crafting recipe of leather using hide
- Foxes, wolves, ocelots and bats now drop hide
- An rather balanced way to get leather from rotten flesh
- Unpack wool into strings

_(check gallery to view additions)_

## Optional requirements
You can also install the optional resourcepack to change the name and texture of rabbit hide to fit better with the changes made by this datapack
